title: MAA Announces Regular Quarterly Preferred Dividend
author: Prnewswire
description: Mid-America Apartment Communities, Inc. (NYSE: MAA) announced a quarterly dividend of $1.0625 per share on its 8.50% Series I Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock, payable on June 30, 2026, to shareholders of record on June 15, 2026.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company is maintaining its regular quarterly preferred dividend payment, demonstrating financial stability and commitment to shareholders. Consistent dividend payments are a positive indicator of operational health and cash flow generation for a REIT.

The company is maintaining its regular quarterly preferred dividend payment, demonstrating financial stability and commitment to shareholders. Consistent dividend payments are a positive indicator of operational health and cash flow generation for a REIT.

title: MAA Announces Quarterly Common Dividend
author: Prnewswire
description: Mid-America Apartment Communities, Inc. (NYSE: MAA) announced a quarterly common dividend of $1.53 per share, payable on July 31, 2026. This marks the 130th consecutive quarterly dividend, with the company maintaining an unbroken dividend payment history over its 30+ years as a public company.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company announced its 130th consecutive quarterly dividend with no history of reductions or suspensions over 30+ years as a public company. This demonstrates strong financial stability, consistent cash generation, and commitment to shareholder returns, which are positive indicators for investors.

title: MAA Announces Quarterly Common Dividend
author: Prnewswire
description: Mid-America Apartment Communities, Inc. (NYSE: MAA) announced a quarterly common dividend of $1.53 per share, payable on April 30, 2026. This marks the 129th consecutive quarterly dividend, with the company maintaining an unbroken dividend payment history over its 30+ years as a public company.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company demonstrates strong financial health and shareholder commitment through its 129th consecutive quarterly dividend payment with no history of reductions or suspensions over 30+ years. This consistent dividend track record indicates stable cash flows and reliable business performance, which are positive indicators for investors seeking income and stability.

title: MAA Announces Regular Quarterly Preferred Dividend
author: Prnewswire
description: Mid-America Apartment Communities, Inc. (NYSE: MAA) announced a quarterly dividend of $1.0625 per share on its 8.50% Series I Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock, payable on March 31, 2026, to shareholders of record on March 13, 2026.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company is maintaining its regular quarterly preferred dividend payment, demonstrating financial stability and commitment to shareholder returns. Consistent dividend payments are generally viewed positively by investors as they indicate operational strength and cash flow generation.

title: MAA Announces Taxable Composition of 2025 Distributions
author: Prnewswire
description: Mid-America Apartment Communities, Inc. (MAA) announced the taxable composition of its 2025 distributions to shareholders. The company expects no portion of 2025 distributions to represent a return of capital and incurred no foreign taxes. The announcement is based on preliminary tax work and is subject to adjustment upon completion of filings.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The announcement is a routine tax composition disclosure for dividend distributions with no material changes expected. There is no indication of positive or negative business developments, earnings surprises, or operational changes. It is a standard administrative communication to shareholders and tax preparers.
